form.label: SafeLine — Compliance & Audit Report
form.description: Audit-ready summary suitable for SOC reports, exec reviews and compliance evidence.

search.query: `safeline_waf` | eval bucket = if(_time>=relative_time(now(),"$tr.earliest$"),"current","previous") | stats count AS c by bucket | eventstats sum(c) AS total_current eval(bucket="current"), sum(c) AS total_previous eval(bucket="previous") | where bucket="current" | eval delta_pct = round((c - relative_lookup_previous) / relative_lookup_previous * 100, 1) | fields c
`safeline_waf` is_attack=1 | stats count count(eval(blocked=1)) AS b | eval rate=round(b/count*100,1) | fields rate
`safeline_waf` | stats count count(eval(is_https=1)) AS https | eval rate=round(https/count*100,1) | fields rate

chart.title: Daily request volume — current vs previous period

search.query: `safeline_waf` | eval period = if(_time>=relative_time(now(),"$tr.earliest$"), "current", "previous") | eval shift = if(period="previous", relative_time(_time, "$tr.earliest$") - relative_time(now(), "$prev_tok$"|head 1), 0) | eval _time = if(period="previous", _time - shift, _time) | timechart span=1d count by period
`safeline_waf` is_attack=1 | timechart span=1d count by severity useother=f

chart.title: Attack heatmap (hour of day × day of week)

search.query: `safeline_waf` is_attack=1 | eval hour = strftime(_time, "%H") | eval dow = strftime(_time, "%w-%a") | chart count over hour by dow

`safeline_waf` is_attack=1 | lookup safeline_attack_type_lookup attack_type | fillnull value="Other" attack_category | stats count AS attacks count(eval(blocked=1)) AS blocked by attack_category | eval mitigation = round(blocked/attacks*100,1) | sort - attacks

`safeline_waf` site_url=* | stats count AS requests count(eval(is_attack=1)) AS attacks count(eval(blocked=1)) AS blocked count(eval(severity=="critical")) AS critical count(eval(severity=="high")) AS high count(eval(is_https=1)) AS https_requests dc(src_country) AS countries dc(src_ip) AS unique_sources earliest(_time) AS first_seen latest(_time) AS last_seen by site_name site_uuid | eval https_pct = round(https_requests/requests*100, 1) | eval mitigation = if(attacks>0, round(blocked/attacks*100,1), "n/a") | eval first_seen = strftime(first_seen, "%F %T") | eval last_seen = strftime(last_seen, "%F %T") | sort - requests | fields site_name site_uuid requests attacks critical high blocked mitigation https_pct unique_sources countries first_seen last_seen

`safeline_waf` is_attack=1 | stats count AS attacks count(eval(blocked=1)) AS blocked count(eval(severity=="critical")) AS critical dc(attack_type) AS distinct_types dc(site_url) AS sites_targeted values(attack_type) AS attack_types values(site_name) AS sites earliest(_time) AS first_seen latest(_time) AS last_seen by src_ip src_country | eval first_seen = strftime(first_seen, "%F %T") | eval last_seen = strftime(last_seen, "%F %T") | sort - critical - attacks | head 25

`safeline_waf` is_attack=1 rule_id=* | stats count AS hits count(eval(blocked=1)) AS blocks_made dc(src_ip) AS distinct_sources dc(site_url) AS sites_protected values(attack_type) AS attack_types values(severity) AS severities by rule_id policy_rule | eval block_rate = round(blocks_made/hits*100, 1) | sort - blocks_made | head 30
